_note: Rolodex format (2026-07-17): apps v0.2.46+ rotate through `banners` on a rotateSeconds schedule (14400 = 4h — Tyler: consistent presence, not an annoyance; dismissing hides only until the next slot). Top-level id/message/linkText/url = LEGACY single-banner shape for older apps — keep it mirroring the strongest promo. Rules: only code DTJ, only codeWorks firms, never invent a promo, url = affiliateUrl, unique id per promotion. NEVER write 'no current sale' — if a promo can't be verified, the fallback line is just '<Firm> — code DTJ works anytime.' (asserting absence was wrong 5-for-7 on 2026-07-19).
